description: A vertical, portrait-orientation call-to-action graphic from the U.S. Department of Labor. The background is a softly blurred photograph of a person's hands typing on a laptop keyboard, overlaid with a dark blue/navy color wash for contrast. Centered in the upper portion is a large semi-transparent line-art version of the official Department of Labor seal (eagle atop a shield with an anvil and tools, ringed by 'DEPARTMENT OF LABOR * UNITED STATES OF AMERICA'). In the lower half, bold white serif text reads 'Need help with an issue at your workplace?' followed by 'Request an opinion letter: dol.gov/opinion-letters.' The design is a clean, official compliance-assistance promo. The messaging technique is a straightforward government-service call to action directing workers and employers to the DOL opinion-letter program, projecting the agency as a helpful resource. Target audience is workers and employers seeking workplace guidance.
notable_text: Need help with an issue at your workplace? Request an opinion letter: dol.gov/opinion-letters
